sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71464" key="ca/nqwsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξάνθ-ωσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n71464.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ξάνθισις</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Democr.</author> </bibl>Alch. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1306.tlg001:p.54B" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.54B.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
